title: LeetHub: Revived & Enhanced
tech: JavaScript, Chrome Extension API (MV3), GitHub API
description: Revived and refactored a popular unmaintained open-source extension to automate LeetCode-to-GitHub syncing. Fixed critical authentication bugs, migrated to Manifest V3 for modern browser support, and implemented new features for personal workflow optimization.

title: Vibe Semantic Search
description: Winner of the 2025 Corner-DSC-BAC Datathon. Developed a high-performance semantic search engine that utilizes FAISS for vector indexing and Sentence Transformers for contextual query understanding.

title: iCloud MCP Server
description: An HTTP Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that bridges LLM-aware clients (ChatGPT, IDEs) with iCloud Calendar. Enables AI agents to autonomously manage schedule data via secure CalDAV integrations.

title: NYC Mayor Prediction Model
description: A sophisticated Bayesian precinct-level model forecasting the 2025 NYC mayoral election. Combines ranked-choice voting simulations with RAG-based issue-salience embeddings and ACS covariate analysis.

title: Prime Factorization Game
description: An interactive web game focused on prime factorization. Features a global leaderboard and real-time data persistence powered by Supabase.

title: Robin's Portfolio Site
description: This site being my personal site and project showcase, built with a focus on clean UI and responsive design.

title: Test Me Please
description: HackNYU Fall 2025 project. An adaptive learning platform that generates and grades practice exams using RAG and local embeddings to provide course-grounded feedback.

title: Authorship Stylometry Pipeline
description: An end-to-end stylometric analysis pipeline used to predict authorship and gender in 19th-century literature using character n-grams, function word frequency, and linear classifiers.
